title: Applied Interfaces | AE2 GUI
description: Changes the vanilla's UI to match the UI of the Applied Energistics 2 mod.
body:
![Applied Interfaces Thumbnail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23719421210daf48b59cb3f8b4d5772be71fb8c7.png) # About This resourcepack changes the in-game's UI to match the one seen in the Applied Energistics 2 mod. Altought this one is directly inspired by the [AE2 Dark Mode](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ae2-dark-mode) resourcepack. # Credits - Most base textures & style from: [AE2 Dark Mode](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ae2-dark-mode) - Main inspiration: [Applied Energistics 2](https://modrinth.com/mod/ae2) - Partly also inspired by: [OreUI Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/oreui-reimagined) # FAQ
Light mode? No. Though if anyone wants to take this pack, change the colors and upload it themself, feel free to.
Interface XXX is missing. Some textures have not been changes, so this is possible, though there is currently no place to report bugs.
Are you going to update to 1.XX.XX. I will not be backporting this resourcepack to previous versions, but I will hopefully be able to update it to newer versions.
Will you support XXX mod? Don't have any plans to support any other mods other than vanilla, but may decide to change that later.
